context: Documentation audit for IIKit: fixing 20+ stale references including test-specs.md ظْ .feature files migration, testified stage addition, phase numbering corrections, and clarify utility reclassification

checklist.name: update_testspecs_references_to_feature_files
checklist.example: API-REFERENCE.md, AGENTS.md, and other docs: `tests/test-specs.md` ظْ `tests/features/*.feature` in the skill output table, artifact table, error messages, and prerequisite sections
checklist.description: All references to `tests/test-specs.md` are replaced with references to `tests/features/*.feature` (or equivalent Gherkin .feature file paths) across documentation files

checklist.name: add_testified_stage_documentation
checklist.example: API-REFERENCE.md: new Feature Stages table row ظ¤ `testified` | `plan.md` exists and `tests/features/*.feature` files are present, but no `tasks.md` | `/iikit-05-tasks`
checklist.description: The `testified` feature stage is documented in the API reference, describing that it occurs when `.feature` files exist but no `tasks.md` yet, and that the next step is `/iikit-05-tasks`

checklist.name: fix_framework_principles_phase_structure
checklist.example: FRAMEWORK-PRINCIPLES.md: old numbered list 0-9 with clarify as step 2 replaced by 'Utilities' section listing clarify/bugfix/core, and 'Phases' section listing 0-8 with correct skill names
checklist.description: FRAMEWORK-PRINCIPLES.md separates utilities (clarify, bugfix, core) from numbered pipeline phases, and lists phases with accurate current skill command names (e.g., `/iikit-00-constitution` through `/iikit-08-taskstoissues`)

checklist.name: remove_clarify_question_cap
checklist.example: API-REFERENCE.md: `Maximum 5 questions asked per run` ظْ `Clarification continues until all critical ambiguities are resolved`
checklist.description: Documentation for the clarify skill no longer states a maximum of 5 questions per run; instead it indicates clarification continues until all critical ambiguities are resolved

checklist.name: update_stale_command_names_in_templates
checklist.description: Templates and skill files that referenced old command names (e.g., `/iikit-plan`, `/iikit-tasks`) are updated to use current numbered equivalents (e.g., `/iikit-02-plan`, `/iikit-05-tasks`)

checklist.name: update_agents_md_test_directory_structure
checklist.example: AGENTS.md: `test-specs.md          # Generated test specifications` ظْ `features/              # Gherkin .feature files (locked by assertion hash)`
checklist.description: AGENTS.md directory tree is updated to reflect that the `tests/` subdirectory contains a `features/` subdirectory with Gherkin `.feature` files rather than a single `test-specs.md` file

checklist.name: add_testified_to_state_machine_skill
checklist.example: SKILL.md: `tasks-ready` suggestion chain updated to include `| testified ظْ /iikit-05-tasks |` between the `planned` and `tasks-ready` entries
checklist.description: The iikit-core SKILL.md state machine is updated to include `testified` as a stage, mapping it to the appropriate next skill command

checklist.name: add_feature_stages_table_to_api_reference
checklist.example: API-REFERENCE.md: new 'Feature Stages' section with table covering `specified`, `planned`, `testified`, `tasks-ready`, `implementing-NN%`, `complete`
checklist.description: A Feature Stages table is added to the API reference that documents all stages from `specified` through `complete` with the conditions for each stage and the suggested next skill

checklist.name: fix_phase_separation_section_numbering
checklist.description: Section numbering in PHASE-SEPARATION.md is corrected so that the Tasks section heading matches the actual skill number (5, not 4)

checklist.name: add_testspec_template_file
checklist.example: New file `.claude/skills/iikit-04-testify/templates/testspec-template.md` with tag conventions (@TS-XXX, @FR-XXX, @SC-XXX, etc.) and Gherkin template with Background, Scenario, Scenario Outline, Rule examples
checklist.description: A Gherkin feature file template is added in the testify skill's templates directory, documenting tag conventions and example scenario structures

checklist.name: bump_version_consistently
checklist.example: tile.json: `2.7.2` ظْ `2.7.3`; README.md: `What's New in v2.7.2` ظْ `What's New in v2.7.3`
checklist.description: The version number is updated consistently across the tile metadata and README, with both pointing to the same new version

checklist.name: no_unrelated_changes
checklist.example: Ground truth modifies only documentation files: AGENTS.md, API-REFERENCE.md, CHANGELOG.md, DASHBOARD.md, FRAMEWORK-PRINCIPLES.md, PHASE-SEPARATION.md, README.md, TESTING_STRATEGY.md, tile.json, and skill template/config files (.claude/skills/iikit-core/SKILL.md, plan-template.md, testspec-template.md)
checklist.description: Solution does not modify files or components outside the scope of the documentation audit task (no changes to shell scripts, skill logic, or source code files)
